mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id, alert_status, updated_at FROM long_term_alert_status ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO long_term_alert_status (employee_id, alert_status, updated_at) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{alertStatus}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE alert_status = #{alertStatus}, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT e.id AS employee_id, e.employee_no, e.name AS employee_name, e.department, rm.name AS room_name, d.name AS dormitory_name, r.checkin_date, e.first_use_date, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, e.first_use_date, CURDATE()) AS years_of_stay, GREATEST(0, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE_ADD(e.first_use_date, INTERVAL #{thresholdYears} YEAR))) AS overdue_days, DATE_ADD(e.first_use_date, INTERVAL #{thresholdYears} YEAR) AS overdue_since, COALESCE(las.alert_status, 'pending') AS alert_status, las.updated_at FROM residences r INNER JOIN employees e ON e.id = r.employee_id AND e.is_deleted = 0 AND e.first_use_date IS NOT NULL INNER JOIN rooms rm ON rm.id = r.room_id AND rm.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = rm.dormitory_id AND d.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN long_term_alert_status las ON las.employee_id = e.id WHERE r.status = 'active' AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, e.first_use_date, CURDATE()) >= #{thresholdYears} ORDER BY years_of_stay DESC, e.first_use_date ASC
